positive: A highly stylized and symmetrical celestial botanical pattern featuring lunar phases, stylized wildflowers, and intricate star constellations. The artwork must use strong, clean linework and limited flat areas of color. Composition must be perfectly centered, circular, and easily scalable for apparel printing. Style: Neo-tribal linework merged with Art Deco geometric graphic novel aesthetics. Color Palette: deep indigo, burnt orange, rich cream, and accents of metallic gold. The design should maintain high visual contrast, dramatic symmetry, and the quality of a modern vector illustration, isolated on a pure white background.
